sizing_rule.note: Apply fractional optimal f (FRAC < 1.0) to reduce variance loss when trading multiple systems simultaneously without recapitalization between trades. Formula: FSD = SD * FRAC; FGHPR = (FAHPR^2 - FSD^2)^(1/2). Specific fraction value not provided by author.

source_rule_text: Use fractional optimal f to reduce the efficiency loss inherent in simultaneous portfolio trading when unable to recapitalize after each individual position.
